case_title: LOLA OREKHA et al VS. SEARS ROEBUCK AND CO et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER DENYING DEFENDANT SEARS ROEBUCK AND CO.'S MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OREKHA, LOLA BABAOYE, FEMI
REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR JUN-24-2013. NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT FILED ON 2/14/13. CASE IS ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 610 ON APR-16-2013 AT 10:30 AM FOR DISMISSAL PER CRC 3.1385. (206)
DECLARATION OF MARY C BARNES FILED BY PLAINTIFF OREKHA, LOLA BABAOYE, FEMI

LAW AND MOTION 302, JUDGE MILLER DISCLOSED THAT SHE HAS KNOWN MR. ALLEN SINCE CHILDHOOD BUT THIS DOES NOT AFFECT HER ABILITY TO BE FAIR AND IMPARTIAL IN THIS CASE. THERE WAS NO OBJECTION BY EITHER PARTY. DEFENDANT SEARS ROEBUCK AND CO.'S MOTION FOR TRANSFER OF VENUE IS DENIED. DEFENDANT FAILS TO DEMONSTRATE THAT PLAINTIFF COMMENCED THIS ACTION IN THE WRONG COURT AND DEFENDANT'S ARGUMENT REGARDING THE CONVENIENCE OF WITNESSES IS PREMATURE BECAUSE NO ANSWER IS ON FILE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976
JURY FEES DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF OREKHA, LOLA

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-15-2013 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-16-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-29-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Transfer Of Venue
Off Calendar Feb-11-2013 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-11-2012 Set For Trial On Jun-24-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Transfer Of Venue And Pos
Off Calendar Aug-21-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jeffrey W. Allen, Esq. of Van De Poel Levy & Allen, Tel. 925.330.1141, for Defendant and moving party;
Richard L. Frischer of the Dolon Law Firm, Tel. 415.421.2800, for Plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: Judge Miller disclosed that she has known Mr. Allen since childhood but this does not affect her ability to be fair and impartial in this case. There was no objection by either party. The matter was argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SEARS ROEBUCK AND CO.'S Motion For Transfer Of Venue is denied. Defendant fails to demonstrate that plaintiff commenced this action in the wrong court and defendant's argument regarding the convenience of witnesses is premature because no answer is on file. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976

Notice Of Motion For Change Of Venue
Off Calendar Aug-21-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANST SIMON PROPERTY GROUP, INC. and FARALLON CAPITAL MANAGEMENT, LLC'S Joinder in Defendant Sears, Roebuck and Co.'s Motion For Change Of Venue is off calendar. Defendants Simon's and Farallon's attempt to join Sears' motion is untimely. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976
